source_pr.title: *: clone AggDesc before modifying its `Mode` in AggDesc.Split
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Before this commit, when enabling prepare plan cache, the following sql will panic:
``` sql
create table t(a int, b int);
insert into t value(1,1),(2,2);
prepare stmt from 'select distinct a from t order by a';

execute stmt;
execute stmt; -- This will fail.
```

### What is changed and how it works?

Why PlanCache will impact the behavior of the above sql?
1. If the aggregate function can be executed parallelly, AggFuncDesc.Split will be called when building HashAggExec to split the AggFuncDesc into partialAggDesc and finalAggDesc.
2. Before AggFuncDesc.Split, the AggFuncMode will **ONLY** be CompleteMode and FinalMode.
3. After AggFuncDesc.Split, the origin AggFuncDesc.Mode will be changed into Partial1Mode or Partial2Mode.
4. PreparePlanCache would cache the physical plan, when we use the cached plan to build the HashAggExec again, the AggFuncDesc.Mode has been modified in `step 3`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Integration test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects


Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch
release-2.1

symptoms: tk.MustExec(`prepare stmt6 from "select distinct a from t order by a"`) (planner/core/prepare_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustExec(`prepare stmt6 from "select distinct a from t order by a"`) (planner/core/prepare_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The failure is plan-cache dependent: AggFuncDesc.Split mutates AggDesc.Mode while building HashAgg, and with prepared plan cache the physical plan (and its AggDesc) can be reused across executions. Reusing a mutated AggDesc can cause panics or wrong behavior on subsequent EXECUTEs. This PR stabilizes it by cloning AggDesc before modifying Mode, keeping cached plan state immutable.
fix_pattern: Avoid mutating cached plan state: clone AggDesc before Split modifies its Mode when plan cache is enabled.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustExec(`prepare stmt6 from "select distinct a from t order by a"`) (planner/core/prepare_test.go)

files: executor/aggfuncs/func_avg_test.go, executor/aggfuncs/func_count_test.go, executor/aggfuncs/func_max_min_test.go, executor/aggfuncs/func_sum_test.go, executor/builder.go, expression/aggregation/descriptor.go, planner/core/prepare_test.go
